artifacts_produced.description: Full audit: 5 breaking issues, 7 recommended fixes, container gap table

key_decisions.summary: Create containers/red_ml/ separately from containers/red/ — they are different tools
Use containers/wgs/ for add_md_tag and bcftools rules (already has samtools+bcftools)
Create containers/star/ rather than reusing lodei.sif for clarity
Add downstream_scripts_dir to config.yaml; use {params.downstream_dir}/ in shell
Follow editing_wgs container_for() + containers: config block pattern exactly

open_issues.summary: Downstream/Benchmark submodule is empty — scripts must be initialized before pipeline runs
RED-ML Perl/R container needs version pinning for red_ML.pl and R packages
profiles/tscc2/config.yaml may need --software-deployment-method apptainer update for Snakemake 9

resumption_context: Research is complete. The Morales_et_all pipeline needs: (1) container_for() helper + SIF_DIR/CONTAINERS globals added to Snakefile, (2) containers: block in config.yaml with 9 tool→SIF mappings, (3) container:/log:/resources: added to all 9 rules, (4) shell commands updated to use container-native executables instead of ~/bin paths, (5) downstream script paths via config key, (6) 4 new Dockerfiles: containers/star/, containers/red_ml/, containers/fastx/, containers/morales_downstream/. The editing_wgs/ pipeline is the reference for all patterns.
